### Instruction

List public databases that contain ATAC-seq data from human Type 2 Diabetes (T2D) samples.

### Constraints

* Include only databases/repositories (NOT individual datasets)
* Only ATAC-seq (exclude RNA-seq, ChIP-seq, etc.)
* Must be publicly accessible
* Human data only
* Avoid generic databases unless T2D ATAC-seq is clearly supported

### Output Format

| Database Name | URL | Description | Evidence of T2D relevance |
Include only databases/repositories; Only ATAC-seq; Publicly accessible; Human data; Avoid generic databases unless T2D ATAC-seq is clearly supported.

column3: Description
Primary public repository for high-throughput sequencing data including ATAC-seq
column4: Hosts multiple T2D ATAC-seq datasets (e.g., GSE137889 - ATAC-seq from T2D and non-diabetic human pancreatic islets; scATAC-seq from human islets with T2D regulatory signatures)

column3: Raw sequencing data repository
column4: Contains T2D ATAC-seq submissions (e.g., PRJNA822928 - single-cell multiome ATAC/RNA from 20 individuals including T2D donors; PRJNA1091960 - ATAC-seq for T2D effector gene identification)

column3: Specialized atlas for metabolic disease functional genomics
column4: Dedicated T2D resource with 7 ATAC-seq assays from human islets; includes single-cell ATAC-seq data revealing T2D regulatory signatures; linked to Diabetes Epigenome Atlas

column3: Comprehensive T2D genetics resource
column4: Integrates epigenomic data including ATAC-seq from human pancreatic islets; connected to CMDGA and Diabetes Epigenome Atlas for T2D variant interpretation

column3: European mirror for sequencing data
column4: Accepts/hosts ATAC-seq submissions from T2D studies; data synchronized with NCBI SRA

column3: Controlled-access repository for human genotype-phenotype data
column4: Contains T2D-related studies with ATAC-seq data requiring approved access (e.g., T2D-GENES consortium studies)
